title: philoglossa pterocarpa
intro: Philoglossa pterocarpa, also known as the tongue fern, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Philoglossa pterocarpa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although its use and availability may vary due to its native and potentially endangered status.
